initiatives.name: Arcus Center for Social Justice Leadership
initiatives.description: A community center fostering mutual aid and social justice through education, organizing, and movement building in Kalamazoo. They coordinate leadership development, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through intersectional justice work, community partnerships, and creating spaces for transformative change.

initiatives.name: Kalamazoo Harm Reduction
initiatives.description: Syringe service program, free narcan, and overdose prevention trainings.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Kalamazoo
initiatives.description: we use donated foods to make and deliver weekly hot meals to unhoused folks
